planner.title: FINANCIAL CHECK
planner.monthlySavingsHint: Amount you invest or save each month.
planner.savingsGrowthRateHint: Annual percentage increase of your savings rate. E.g. 3% for expected salary increases.
planner.pensionMonthlyHint: Estimated state pension. Check your current pension statement.
planner.taxEtf: For wealth projection. The actual withdrawal rate is set below.
planner.etfWithdrawalRateHint: Share of ETF assets you withdraw annually. Classic: 4% (Trinity Study). Used independently of the return for the FIRE calculation. If this rate is too high, your portfolio may drop to zero.
planner.taxCash: For cash, only interest income is considered – no capital withdrawal. €1,000 allowance per person.
planner.retirementBudgetSub: Your planned monthly expenses in retirement
planner.inflationRateHint: Annual cost increase in retirement. 0% = no adjustment. Typical: 2% (ECB target).
planner.assetTaxRateHint: Here you can specify the tax on your asset income. For simplicity, this rate is applied uniformly to all asset types. Typical: 25% withholding tax + 5.5% solidarity surcharge = 26.375%. Incl. church tax approx. 27.8–28.6%.
planner.architectureTitle: The architecture of your financial freedom.
planner.gkvCapped: The maximum GKV contribution of {{amount}} € / month is applied (contribution cap).
planner.gkvUncapped: Approx. 21% of your asset income in the FIRE year is applied (~{{amount}} € / month, max. €1,300).
planner.foundationLaid: of your financial foundation is in place.

prognosis.title: FORECAST
prognosis.disclaimerText: This forecast is for guidance only. Calculations are inflation-adjusted (real values). Actual market volatility may cause deviations. Review your assumptions regularly in the

monteCarlo.title: Monte Carlo Simulation
monteCarlo.subtitle: FINANCIAL SUSTAINABILITY ANALYSIS
monteCarlo.successInfo: Your capital lasts until age 100 in {{count}} out of {{total}} simulated market cycles.
monteCarlo.simulationStart: The simulation starts with {{capital}} portfolio capital in the year {{year}} – based on your configuration.
monteCarlo.pessimisticDesc: The most unfavourable scenario with high inflation and low market growth.
monteCarlo.medianInheritanceDesc: Expected asset surplus at the end of the simulation period.
monteCarlo.chartHint: Tap on the chart for details
monteCarlo.volatilityInfo: Here you can adjust the volatility of market returns per year. Higher volatility leads to larger fluctuations in wealth development, which increases both opportunities and risks.
monteCarlo.expensesInfo: You must include all costs here: variable costs, fixed costs (such as health insurance) and capital gains tax.

monteCarloProView.title: Monte Carlo Simulation Pro
monteCarloProView.subtitle: DYNAMIC EXPENSE MANAGEMENT
monteCarloProView.drawdownDesc: When your portfolio drops significantly from its all-time high, you automatically reduce your monthly expenses. Once it recovers, you return to your normal spending.
monteCarloProView.drawdownThresholdHint: The percentage decline from the all-time high at which you reduce your expenses. E.g. 20 = at -20% from ATH.
monteCarloProView.recoveryThresholdHint: The percentage recovery from the low at which you restore your expenses to the original level. E.g. 15 = at +15% from the low.
monteCarloProView.reducedWithdrawalHint: The amount to which you reduce your monthly expenses during a crisis.

welcome.title: Disclaimer & Methodology
welcome.subtitle: The path to financial freedom requires precision. Before we visualise your future, we must define the mathematical foundations and uncertainties of our modelling.
welcome.section1Text: This module serves as a purely mathematical illustration of a theoretical starting point. The model marks the year as 'FIRE achieved' as soon as your projected wealth multiplied by your self-selected withdrawal rate covers your calculated expenses.
welcome.section1Text2: Important: This calculation is a purely static snapshot of the entry date. It does not simulate market fluctuations and completely excludes the long-term performance of the portfolio after this point. Reaching this calculated target is not a confirmation of permanent stability or lifelong sustainability of your capital. In particular, it does not check whether your chosen withdrawal rate exceeds the actual net return, which could lead to unnoticed capital depletion (bankruptcy risk).
welcome.section2Text: We subject your strategy to a virtual stress test through 1,000 (or 10,000) random market scenarios. The resulting success probabilities are statistical approximations, not guarantees.
welcome.section2Text2: Past market cycles are not a reliable indicator of future developments. Real market performance can deviate massively from these simulations.
welcome.section3Text: All values are presented based on your self-selected inflation rate and deductions. Since taxes and social contributions are the greatest unknown in any strategy, the app does not provide automatic forecasts, but only configurable templates. The calculation strictly follows the percentages and fixed amounts defined by you.
welcome.section3Text2: Note: Since you set these parameters at your own responsibility, it is up to you to adjust them in the event of legal changes or personal status changes (e.g. GKV/PKV). The app cannot predict future contribution developments or tax reforms. Tax laws can change over the FIRE period (30+ years).
welcome.section4Text: This tool is a purely mathematical simulation model for illustration purposes. No investment advice, tax advice or retirement planning takes place. The results are purely hypothetical in nature and do not constitute a recommendation for any particular investment strategy.
welcome.section4Text2: Any liability for financial losses or decisions made on the basis of this software is fully excluded. Use is at your own risk. Despite the greatest care in modelling, mathematical errors, software inaccuracies, rounding differences or logical misinterpretations may occur. The correctness of the results cannot be guaranteed at any time.
welcome.section5Text: Your sensitive financial and asset data remains exclusively locally on your device. Your financial plans are not transmitted to external servers.
welcome.section5Text2: Note: To provide app functionality and display advertising formats, technical device data (e.g. advertising ID) is transmitted to third-party providers (Google AdMob). Details can be found in our privacy policy.
welcome.consent1Desc: I have fully reviewed the methodological foundations and the technical limitations of the simulation.
welcome.consent2Desc: I am aware that this model calculation does not replace financial advice and that the risk of capital depletion remains.
welcome.consent3Desc: I consent to the local storage of my financial data. I acknowledge that this app is ad-supported and that a separate consent request for data protection (Google AdMob) will be shown if not already granted.

calculationInfo.title: The Logic of the Calculation
calculationInfo.subtitle: A look inside the mathematical engine room. Learn how our models work and where they reach their limits.
calculationInfo.section1Text: The FIRE target capital (FIRE Target) is a rigid mathematical threshold. The system calculates this foundation via an exact analytical equation based exclusively on your manual inputs:
calculationInfo.section1Text2: First, the model determines your actual gross requirement by adjusting your stated expenses for the tax burden and inflation you have defined. This calculated total requirement is then divided by your desired withdrawal rate (SWR).
calculationInfo.section1Formula: (Target wealth = inflation- & tax-adjusted expenses / withdrawal rate)
calculationInfo.section1Warning1: No sustainability check: The application solves this equation blindly. The system does not verify whether your chosen withdrawal rate is viable in relation to your self-defined return.
calculationInfo.section1Warning2: The insolvency risk: There is no system-side warning mechanism. If your configured withdrawal rate is higher than your assumed return, the model will deliver an exact target sum – but with such unrealistic inputs you are effectively simulating inevitable insolvency (capital depletion) from the first day of withdrawal.
calculationInfo.section2Text: Determining the duration until financial independence. The system projects your portfolio based on your savings rate and your self-defined return expectation stubbornly into the future until the calculated target wealth is mathematically reached.
calculationInfo.section2Warning1: The blind spot: Real markets do not move in straight lines. Volatility in the accumulation phase can massively distort the calculated FIRE date.
calculationInfo.section2Warning2: The deceptive finish line: Reaching the target wealth is not a safety guarantee for the future. The system stops the accumulation projection on the day the target is reached. If your chosen withdrawal rate (SWR) is too high relative to your own return assumption, your portfolio will inevitably begin to shrink in the very first year of retirement.
calculationInfo.section2Warning: Linear compound interest calculation is a mathematical utopia.
calculationInfo.section3Text: After reaching the FIRE date, the model switches to simulating capital depletion. Here the relentless rigour of mathematics becomes apparent: the system calculates your gross requirement monthly (summing your stated expenses incl. your stated inflation and your stated tax/health insurance burden) and rigidly deducts this from your portfolio.
calculationInfo.section3Warning1: The withdrawal hierarchy: The model operates according to a fixed priority: first, the interest income from your cash holdings is used. Only the amount still needed beyond that to cover your requirements leads to the sale of ETF units and thus to the consumption of capital substance.
calculationInfo.section3Warning2: Mindless subtraction: The app performs no 'intelligence check'. It simply subtracts until the portfolio is exhausted. An overly high withdrawal rate or underestimated taxes inevitably lead to a negative balance in the model.
calculationInfo.section3Warning3: The static error: Since this model ignores market crashes, it shows you a 'fair weather scenario'. In reality, a single stock market crash at the beginning of the withdrawal phase (Sequence of Returns Risk) can destroy the entire calculation.
calculationInfo.section3Badge2: ⚠️ NO AUTOMATIC SAFETY NET OR WARNING
calculationInfo.section4Text: We simulate 10,000 possible market scenarios to determine the robustness of your strategy. This is not a promise, but a stochastic assessment based on historical volatility patterns.
calculationInfo.legalText1: This tool performs exclusively mathematical model calculations based on your inputs. It is not a financial product and not investment advice.
calculationInfo.legalText2: Capital market investments are subject to risks up to and including total loss. The calculations are based on assumptions that may prove incorrect at any time.
calculationInfo.legalText3: Historical returns are not a reliable indicator of future performance.
calculationInfo.legalText4: The scenarios shown are mathematical snapshots and do not constitute an individual investment strategy or recommendation.

privacy.line_1: This privacy policy is available in German and other languages.
privacy.line_2: For a different language, simply change the language settings of your device.
privacy.line_4: Thank you for visiting our website/app. We place great importance on the protection of your data and would like to give you an overview with this privacy policy of how we handle your data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), European data protection laws, as well as the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and California law.
privacy.line_6: Responsible for the processing of your data and publisher of this app is:
privacy.line_12: If you have any questions or concerns about data protection, please contact us at christian.developer.app@gmail.com.
privacy.line_15: We use cookies and similar technologies to offer you personalised advertising and to improve the performance of our website/app. This includes cookies that are stored on your device. These technologies help us to store your preferences and optimise the user experience.
privacy.line_16: We also use Local Storage for the local storage of financial data. However, your data always remains local.
privacy.line_17: - LocalStorage: LocalStorage is a powerful local storage that enables web applications to store data on your device that persists even after the browser is closed. On our platform, we exclusively use LocalStorage and cookies (for advertising). For example, your financial data is stored here, which you can access at any time regardless of whether the browser is open or not.
privacy.line_18: 3. Collection and Processing of Data by AdMob and AdSense
privacy.line_19: We use AdMob and AdSense to display personalised advertising to you. These services use cookies and similar technologies to collect data about your use of the website/app and to offer tailored advertising. The data collected by these services may include:
privacy.line_21: - Information about your interactions with the website/app
privacy.line_23:
The collected data is processed in accordance with Google's privacy policies. For more information, please refer to the privacy policies of Google AdMob and Google AdSense.

To obtain your consent for personalised advertising, we use the Google User Messaging Platform (UMP), which is based on the Transparency and Consent Framework (TCF) Version 2.2 of IAB Europe. When you first launch the app or after your previous decision has expired, a consent request will be displayed allowing you to determine whether and to what extent you consent to data processing. The collected consents relate to, among other things, personalised ads, measurement and sharing with third parties. Your selection is stored locally and can be withdrawn or adjusted at any time.
privacy.line_25: We do not sell any of your data. The data collected by AdMob and AdSense is subject to the privacy policies of the respective providers.
privacy.line_27: You have the right to request information about the data stored about you, to request its correction or deletion, and to restrict processing. Since we do not store our own data, these rights relate to the data collected by AdMob and AdSense. Please contact the respective providers for more information and to exercise your rights.
privacy.line_29: We strive to protect your data through appropriate technical and organisational measures. The security of your data is important to us, and we use security measures in accordance with legal requirements.
privacy.line_31: Personal data is information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person. In this context, personal data may be collected and processed by AdMob and AdSense.
privacy.line_33: We reserve the right to amend this privacy policy to comply with legal requirements or to reflect changes in our data processing practices. Please check this statement regularly to stay informed.
